project.p1: vhtml is a lightweight reactive frontend framework developed by veypi. Started in 2024, it aims to provide a simple, efficient frontend development solution without complex build tools.
project.p2: vhtml uses native HTML5 syntax, allowing developers to build modern Web applications without learning complex build processes or new template syntax.
project.title: Project Introduction

intro.desc: vhtml is a lightweight reactive frontend framework using native HTML5 syntax, enabling rapid Web application development without complex build tools.

project.p1: vhtml 是一个由 veypi 开发的轻量级响应式前端框架。项目始于 2024 年，旨在提供一个简单、高效、无需复杂构建工具的前端开发解决方案。
project.p2: vhtml 采用原生 HTML5 语法，开发者无需学习复杂的构建流程和新的模板语法，即可快速构建现代化的 Web 应用。
project.title: 项目介绍
